title: Register a new business entity
situation: entrepreneur files articles of incorporation or LLC formation; clerk must verify name availability, collect statutory information, assign entity number, and issue certificate of formation within statutory timeframe
motivation: activate legal entity quickly so owner can open bank accounts and obtain licenses
outcome: entity registered; certificate issued; state database updated
success_criteria: name availability confirmed
statutory information collected
entity number assigned
certificate of formation issued within statutory timeframe

title: Issue and manage environmental permit
situation: facility operator applies for air, water, or hazardous waste permit; officer must review application, issue public notice, hold comment period, conduct NEPA review, issue draft permit, resolve comments, and issue final permit
motivation: authorize lawful operations while protecting environmental quality and public health
outcome: permit issued with conditions; compliance schedule established; permit database updated
success_criteria: application completeness review within 30 days
public notice published per regulation
comment period response documented
final permit issued within statutory timeframe

title: Process court filing and docket management
situation: attorney or self-represented litigant files complaint, motion, or appeal; clerk must review filing for completeness and proper form, collect fees, docket the matter, issue summons, and notify all parties
motivation: ensure court record is accurate and parties are properly served within rules of civil procedure
outcome: filing docketed; summons issued; parties notified; hearing scheduled
success_criteria: filing reviewed for completeness on day of submission
fees collected
matter docketed in case management system
summons issued within 3 days
parties served within statutory period

title: Manage public safety incident (emergency response)
situation: major incident activates EOC; coordinator must declare emergency, activate ICS, request mutual aid, coordinate shelter-and-evacuation, submit FEMA PA cost documentation, and close out declaration
motivation: protect life and property and position agency for FEMA reimbursement
outcome: incident declared closed; ICS documentation complete; FEMA project worksheets submitted
success_criteria: EOC activated within 1 hour of incident declaration
ICS 214 activity logs maintained
mutual aid requests documented
FEMA project worksheets submitted within 60 days

title: Administer public assistance program enrollment
situation: applicant seeks Medicaid, SNAP, or TANF benefits; worker must verify identity and income, apply eligibility criteria, determine benefit amount, issue notice of action within regulatory timeframe, and set renewal date
motivation: serve eligible residents quickly while applying statutory eligibility rules accurately
outcome: eligibility determination made; benefit amount calculated; notice of action mailed; benefits issued
success_criteria: application processed within regulatory timeframe (30-45 days depending on program)
income and identity verified through primary sources
notice of action mailed
EBT card or benefit issued within 5 days of approval

title: Manage property tax assessment cycle
situation: annual reassessment requires mass appraisal updates, mailing of assessment notices to all parcels, managing appeal window, conducting informal hearings, and certifying tax roll for collection
motivation: produce accurate and legally defensible assessments that meet state equalization requirements
outcome: assessment notices mailed; appeals processed; tax roll certified to tax collector
success_criteria: mass appraisal values updated per assessment year
assessment notices mailed by statutory date
appeal hearings scheduled within statutory window
tax roll certified to collector by deadline

title: Process zoning change or variance application
situation: property owner applies for rezoning or variance; planning staff must review application, conduct CEQA analysis, schedule planning commission hearing, post notice, present staff report, and implement commission decision
motivation: process land use application within statutory timeframe while ensuring public participation
outcome: planning commission decision issued; conditions recorded; GIS zoning map updated
success_criteria: application completeness review within 30 days
CEQA notice of determination filed
public notice posted 10+ days before hearing
written decision issued within 10 days of hearing

title: Manage federal grant compliance and reporting
situation: agency receives federal grant; officer must track allowable expenditures, meet single audit threshold reporting, submit quarterly performance reports, and respond to monitoring visits
motivation: maintain grant compliance to avoid disallowed costs, findings, or grant termination
outcome: SF-425 submitted on time; single audit filed if threshold met; monitoring findings resolved
success_criteria: expenditures tracked by allowable cost category
SF-425 submitted by due date
single audit filed within 9 months of fiscal year end if threshold met
monitoring findings responded to within 30 days

title: Issue professional license
situation: applicant submits license application with transcripts, exam scores, fingerprints, and work history; examiner must verify all credentials through primary sources, apply board standards, and issue license or denial with appeal rights
motivation: protect public by licensing only qualified practitioners while processing within mandated timeframe
outcome: license issued or denial with appeal rights; license database updated; certificate mailed
success_criteria: all credentials verified through primary sources
exam scores confirmed with testing vendor
background check cleared
license issued within statutory processing time

title: Manage procurement contract administration
situation: awarded contract requires contractor performance monitoring, invoice review, change-order processing under FAR/state procurement code, cure notice if performance deficient, and closeout at completion
motivation: ensure contractor performance meets contract terms and public funds are spent appropriately
outcome: all deliverables accepted; final payment made; contract closed; lessons learned documented
success_criteria: contractor performance monitored against PWS
invoices reviewed and approved within 30 days
change orders within scope and properly authorized
final payment made within 30 days of acceptance

title: Process voter registration
situation: citizen submits voter registration application; clerk must verify identity, check eligibility criteria, update rolls, send confirmation, and process NVRA-required agency registrations
motivation: enfranchise eligible voters while maintaining accurate voter rolls under NVRA and HAVA requirements
outcome: voter registered and confirmed; state voter file updated; NVRA motor-voter records processed
success_criteria: eligibility verified within processing window
confirmation mailed within 2 weeks
state voter file updated before registration deadline
NVRA agency records processed per federal requirements

title: Manage public works capital project
situation: capital project progresses from design through bidding, contractor selection, construction inspection, change orders, and final acceptance; Davis-Bacon wage rates and prevailing wage posting required
motivation: deliver project on time and within budget while meeting Davis-Bacon and prevailing wage requirements
outcome: project accepted; final payment made; as-built drawings filed; infrastructure database updated
success_criteria: design approved before bid advertisement
Davis-Bacon wage decision posted
construction inspection documented
change orders within budget contingency
final acceptance documented

title: Handle administrative appeal hearing
situation: agency decision is appealed; ALJ must schedule hearing, manage prehearing conference, take testimony, apply APA procedural rules, and issue final decision with findings
motivation: provide fair and impartial review meeting APA due process requirements
outcome: decision issued within statutory timeframe; record preserved; judicial review rights stated
success_criteria: hearing scheduled within statutory timeframe
prehearing conference held
testimony taken on the record
written decision with findings of fact issued

title: Conduct government performance audit
situation: legislative or executive audit covers program effectiveness, financial controls, or contract oversight; auditor must develop objectives, collect evidence, issue draft report, receive management response, and issue final report
motivation: provide independent assessment of program efficiency and compliance to legislature and public
outcome: final audit report issued; management responses incorporated; recommendations tracked
success_criteria: audit objectives approved before fieldwork
draft report issued within 30 days of fieldwork
management response received within 30 days
final report published within 15 days of response

title: Manage government cybersecurity incident (FISMA/CISA)
situation: federal agency or state government detects a cybersecurity incident; CISO must activate incident response plan, report to CISA within 1 hour (CIRCIA), conduct forensics, notify OMB/congressional oversight, and remediate
motivation: contain breach, meet FISMA and CIRCIA reporting obligations, and prevent recurrence
outcome: incident contained; CISA notified within 1 hour; OMB report submitted; POA&M updated
success_criteria: CISA notified within 1 hour of discovery
incident contained and eradicated
OMB report filed within required timeframe
POA&M updated with new weakness

title: Process procurement protest or contract dispute
situation: unsuccessful bidder files protest with GAO, COFC, or state protest authority; contracting officer must prepare agency report, suspend performance if required, implement corrective action if protest sustained
motivation: resolve protest efficiently while protecting valid award and complying with protest authority orders
outcome: protest decided; corrective action implemented if required; bid file preserved
success_criteria: agency report filed within protest authority deadline
performance suspended if required
corrective action plan prepared if protest sustained
bid file documentation preserved

title: Manage social services case
situation: vulnerable resident requires case management: needs assessment, safety plan, service plan, provider coordination, court reporting if required, and case review at mandated intervals
motivation: protect vulnerable resident and meet statutory case management and reporting requirements
outcome: safety plan in place; services engaged; court reports filed; case reviewed at mandated interval
success_criteria: initial assessment completed within 24-72 hours depending on risk level
safety plan developed
service providers engaged within 5 days
court reports filed on time

title: Process tax lien and delinquent collection
situation: delinquent taxpayer has unpaid property or business taxes; collector must issue statutory notices, file tax lien, offer installment agreement, and proceed to tax sale or levy if not resolved
motivation: collect delinquent revenue while following statutory due process before enforced collection
outcome: delinquent taxes collected or installment agreement in place; tax lien filed; tax sale scheduled if no resolution
success_criteria: statutory notices sent in proper sequence
tax lien filed within statutory timeframe
installment agreement offered before enforcement
tax sale advertised per statutory requirements

title: Manage regulatory rulemaking (APA notice-and-comment)
situation: agency proposes new or amended rule; officer must draft NPRM, publish in Federal Register, manage public comment period, prepare final rule with responses to significant comments, and submit for OMB OIRA review
motivation: promulgate legally defensible final rule that withstands judicial review under APA arbitrary-and-capricious standard
outcome: final rule published in Federal Register; effective date set; guidance documents updated; OIRA review closed
success_criteria: NPRM published with complete regulatory analysis
comment period open for minimum 60 days
all significant comments addressed in preamble
OIRA review completed before publication
cost-benefit analysis meets EO 12866 requirements

title: Process Freedom of Information Act request
situation: member of public or media submits FOIA request; coordinator must log receipt, acknowledge within 20 working days, search all responsive records, apply exemptions, redact, and issue final determination
motivation: fulfill transparency obligations within statutory timeframes to avoid litigation and OGIS complaints
outcome: records produced or withheld with exemption citation; determination letter issued; FOIA log updated
success_criteria: acknowledgement letter sent within 20 working days
search certified by all responsive offices
exemptions applied with legal review
determination letter cites specific exemptions
fee waiver determination included if requested
